title: War and Peace, Part II: Natasha Rostova
writer: Lev Tolstoy, Sergey Bondarchuk, Vasiliy Solovyov
actors: Lyudmila Saveleva, Sergey Bondarchuk, Vyacheslav Tikhonov
plot: Natasha Rostova, a young Russian aristocrat, meets prince Andrey Bolkonskiy at a ball and immediately falls in love with him.
